prestazioni: Full bolt-on forced induction conversion for the 4.2L FSI V8 (engine code: **420AH**), utilizing a **Rotrex C38-91 supercharger** (12psi peak boost) with a **custom 3.5" intercooler core** (VRSF R8-specific) and **Siemens 630cc injectors** (upgraded from stock 380cc), paired with a **Syvecs S8 ECU** for full flex-fuel (E85) and launch control mapping. Requires **ARP head studs** and **Forgeline CF5V wheels** (20x10.5 +25 front, 20x12 +30 rear) to handle the estimated 650whp on **Motul 300V 10W-60** oil.

Full **KW Suspension Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers** (R8-specific valving) with **H&R 25mm front / 20mm rear sway bars**, **AP Racing 6-piston front / 4-piston rear CCM-R brakes** (380mm rotors), and **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (245/30/20 front, 305/30/20 rear) for optimal mechanical grip. Chassis reinforcement via **034 Motorsport X-Brace** and **AWE Tuning rear subframe collars**.

Dry-sump oil system upgrade with **Moroso 8-quart baffled oil pan** (R8-specific), **Mocal 19-row oil cooler**, and **Canton Racing Products remote filter mount** to prevent oil starvation under sustained 1.5G lateral loads. Exhaust system features a **Fabspeed Motorsport Valvetronic cat-back** (3.5" titanium tips) with **decat downpipes** (200-cell HJS cats) and **Akrapovic R8 V8-specific headers** for optimized scavenging. Transmission upgraded with **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** and **South Bend Stage 3 twin-disc clutch** (ceramic puck).
estetica: Full **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS R8 V8 widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with **custom matte PPF wrap** (3M 1080 Gloss Black) and **Vorsteiner V-FF107 forged wheels** (20x10.5 +25 front, 20x12 +30 rear) in **Gunmetal Bronze**. Front splitter features **R8-specific APR GT-250 carbon fiber** with **custom canards** (3D-printed ABS, painted to match).

Interior stripped and reupholstered with **Recaro Pole Position seats** (fixed-back, carbon fiber shells) wrapped in **Alcantara (Rosso Corsa stitching)**, **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (suede, 320mm), and **custom roll cage** (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, **Custom Cages UK**). Dashboard overlay in **carbon fiber weave** (R8-specific, **Euro-Compulsion**), with **Aim Solo 2 DL GPS data logger** mounted on the A-pillar.

Aerodynamic package includes **R8-specific APR GT-250 rear wing** (carbon fiber, 3D-printed gurney flap) with **custom underbody diffuser** (carbon fiber, **AWE Tuning**), **LED taillights (Lux H8 V4)**, and **custom front grille delete** (replaced with **carbon fiber mesh**, **R8-specific from 034 Motorsport**). Engine bay showcases **carbon fiber engine cover** (R8 V8-specific, **Euro-Compulsion**) with **custom LED under-hood lighting** (Philips Ultinon Pro9000).
